case_title: THE DRESS I WANT VS. CHANTELLE PAIGE SOUTAS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE DRESS I WANT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-01-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE DRESS I WANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTAS, CHANTELLE PAIGE $125.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00, ADDITIONAL DAMAGES DENIED BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO MITIGATE AND ANTICIPATORY REPUDIATION ASSERTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED APR-23-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTAS, CHANTELLE PAIGE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SOUTAS, CHANTELLE PAIGE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE DRESS I WANT AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTAS, CHANTELLE PAIGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY THE DRESS I WANT SOUTAS, CHANTELLE PAIGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2018 BY JPT:ANDREA MCGARY; HONSAN CHUNG APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF; DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER; THEY ARE SWORN AND TESTIFIED ON THEIR OWN BEHALF, NO EXHIBITS RETAINED; JPT: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED; (D506)
